visual_description: The video opens with a close-up, over-the-shoulder shot of a person in a dark, hooded garment. In the dimly lit, cavernous background, another figure stands out of focus. The setting appears to be a dark, industrial, or gothic interior with large, shadowy structures. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the top right corner. The camera is shaky, suggesting a fast-paced action sequence. The audio is a chaotic and intense soundscape of a magical battle. It begins with a sharp, whooshing sound, like a powerful spell being cast and striking its target. The camera cuts to a wider shot, revealing two figures on a wooden walkway. One figure, in the foreground, is silhouetted against a brilliant, swirling green and white light that fills the left side of the frame. The second figure, standing further down the walkway, is a man with a beard, wearing dark robes. The environment is a dark, arched interior with metal railings and chains, suggesting a bridge or catwalk in an old, possibly industrial or gothic structure.
